heading: Free transportation
label: 357 Free transportation
text: It shall not be unlawful for carriers to furnish free transportation to employees qualified for benefits or serving waiting periods under this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , which enacted this chapter and amended sections 503 and 1104 and former , The Public Health and Welfare.
